blockers.automation_boundary: No automatic cutover gate consumes these artifacts yet
blockers.condition: Live validation or smoke evidence shows tenant-impacting failures during cutover rehearsal
operator_response: Revert the rollout slice to the incumbent plane before widening exposure

blockers.automation_boundary: The repo documents the threshold class, but no runtime policy engine enforces it
blockers.condition: Queue lease, replay, or event-sequence anomalies make the tenant outcome unauditable
operator_response: Stop new leases in the Go control plane
Review replay and audit evidence before resuming any cutover step

blockers.automation_boundary: Evidence completeness is a reviewer requirement, not a machine-enforced admission check
blockers.condition: Audit trail or migration evidence is missing for a tenant-scoped rollout checkpoint
operator_response: Do not advance the tenant cutover checkpoint
Restore traffic to the incumbent plane if the missing evidence blocks safe review

issue.title: tenant-scoped rollback guardrails and trigger surface

path: Disable Go dispatch for the affected tenant slice
Redirect eligible traffic back to the incumbent plane
Review shadow, live-validation, and audit artifacts
Confirm rollback blockers and warnings are addressed
Advance rollout only after reviewer signoff

warnings.automation_boundary: Detection is evidence-backed, but the stop/redirect action is still manual
warnings.condition: Shadow parity drift for the tenant or task slice under rollout
operator_response: Stop assigning new Go-owned work for the affected slice
Redirect eligible submissions back to the incumbent plane while the diff is reviewed
